overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn/Forbidden West showing Aloy walking through a tribal waterfront settlement. The character moves along wooden docks past stone and wooden structures, transitioning from open waterfront to covered tavern areas with various NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal waterfront boardwalk approaching covered passage

events.description: entering shadow of covered stone archway

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking steadily along wooden dock toward stone archway

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the main walkway
tall stone wall with wooden beams and tribal carvings
thick wooden support pillar with geometric carvings
wooden stairs leading upward to higher level
stone archway leading to covered passage

segments.scene_description: Aloy begins walking along a weathered wooden dock in a tribal settlement. The path leads toward a stone archway with wooden support pillars visible on the right. As she approaches the archway around 6 seconds, the lighting shifts to shadow before the segment ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with moored boats

events.description: exiting covered archway into bright open waterfront
slight right turn to follow waterfront path

agents.ego_description: Aloy exits the covered passage and continues along the sunlit waterfront boardwalk

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside wooden crate with child nearby

entered.detail: calm water canal with distant shoreline and trees
small wooden boats tied to dock posts
wooden crate with goods and vendor standing guard

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered archway into bright sunlight, the scene opens to a waterfront promenade. Aloy walks past a vendor with a child standing by wooden crates on the right, while wooden boats are moored along the water's edge. The camera follows her path as she turns slightly right to follow the boardwalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront boardwalk with seated villagers and boats

events.description: passing group of seated villagers against stone wall

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking past seated villagers and vendor stalls along the waterfront

notable_agents.action: group of villagers sitting against stone wall
woman with child standing by wooden crates

entered.detail: stacked wooden barrels near water edge
opening to covered tavern area with wooden support beams
wooden stairs leading down toward water

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the waterfront, Aloy passes villagers seated against the stone wall on the left and wooden barrels near the water on the right. The path leads toward a covered tavern entrance visible ahead. The crowd density increases slightly with NPCs both sitting and walking along the dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered tribal tavern with dining tables and wooden stairs

events.description: entering covered tavern area with wooden tables and seated NPCs
turning left toward tavern interior near staircase

agents.ego_description: Aloy enters the tavern area, walking past NPCs seated at wooden tables and toward staircase

notable_agents.action: two villagers sitting at wooden table eating

entered.detail: covered wooden structure with support beams and dining area
wooden dining tables with benches and seated villagers

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered tavern area, the lighting becomes mixed with shadows from the wooden roof beams. Aloy walks past villagers seated at wooden tables on the left, while a wooden staircase becomes prominent on the right. The environment shifts from open waterfront to a sheltered dining space as she moves deeper into the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a tribal waterfront settlement that transitions from open docks into a sheltered tavern area. It begins with Aloy walking along a weathered wooden dock toward a stone archway, where the bright daylight briefly gives way to shadow. As she emerges from the archway back into the sunlight, the scene opens onto a bustling promenade featuring moored boats and vendors standing by wooden crates. The camera then follows her along the boardwalk past villagers resting against stone walls and wooden barrels before turning toward a covered entrance. Finally, the environment shifts from the open waterfront to a sheltered dining space, moving under wooden roof beams and past seated patrons toward a prominent wooden staircase.
